channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Personalized Observation Normalization for Federated Reinforcement Learning in Simulation Environments with Heterogeneity
item.description: Personalized observation normalization enables federated reinforcement learning agents to handle heterogeneous environments by normalizing state inputs locally with adaptive statistics.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] IGADA-IoT: IoT Sensor Energy Optimization in Wireless Sensor Networks Driven by Automatic Data Augmentation
item.description: IGADA-IoT framework optimizes IoT sensor energy consumption in wireless networks using multi-generator automatic data augmentation to improve model accuracy by 7.27%.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Simple State Space Model Excels at Multivariate Time Series Classification
item.description: Diagonal state space models outperform input-dependent Mamba variants for time series classification with greater efficiency.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] $E^3$-Agent: An Executable and Evolving Agent for Resource Management of Edge Generative Inference
item.description: E³-Agent adapts edge generative inference resource management via fast routing and LLM control, achieving 65%-73% latency reduction under dynamic conditions.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Tackling Multimodal Learning Challenges with Mixture-of-Expert: A Survey
item.description: Survey reviews Mixture-of-Experts methods for multimodal learning, examining efficient scaling, representation learning, and adaptive mechanisms for addressing modality challenges.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Metric-Aware PCA as a Linear Instance of Geometric Deep Learning
item.description: Metric-aware PCA is positioned within geometric deep learning, using metric matrices as geometric priors that define symmetries and equivariance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Comparative Analysis of Liquid Neural Networks and LSTM for Sequential Pattern Recognition: Robustness, Efficiency, and Clinical Utility
item.description: Liquid Neural Networks outperform LSTM in parameter efficiency and robustness across neuromorphic, handwriting, and physiological sequential tasks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Architecture-driven Shift: towards a lightweight selector for capturing the trends of logit shift
item.description: Architecture-driven Shift enables efficient prediction of logit shift to select pre-trained models for continual learning without high computational overhead.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Detect by Yourself: Self-Designing Agentic Workflows for Few-Shot Graph Anomaly Detection
item.description: Detect by Yourself: Self-Designing Agentic Workflows for Few-Shot Graph Anomaly Detection

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] HEAL: Resilient and Self-* Hub-based Learning
item.description: HEAL: Resilient and Self-* Hub-based Learning

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Balancing Fidelity and Diversity in Diffusion Models via Symmetric Attention Decomposition: Hopfield Perspective
item.description: Balancing Fidelity and Diversity in Diffusion Models via Symmetric Attention Decomposition: Hopfield Perspective

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Resource-Constrained Affect Modelling via Variance Regularisation Pruning
item.description: Resource-Constrained Affect Modelling via Variance Regularisation Pruning

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Energy-Structured Low-Rank Adaptation for Continual Learning
item.description: Energy-Structured Low-Rank Adaptation for Continual Learning

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Federated Learning for Multivariate Time Series Anomaly Detection in Industrial Automation
item.description: Federated Learning for Multivariate Time Series Anomaly Detection in Industrial Automation

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] GenSBI: Generative Methods for Simulation-Based Inference in JAX
item.description: GenSBI: Generative Methods for Simulation-Based Inference in JAX

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] SparseOpt: Addressing Normalization-induced Gradient Skew in Sparse Training
item.description: SparseOpt: Addressing Normalization-induced Gradient Skew in Sparse Training

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] The Fundamental Limits of Fraud Detection in Card Payment Networks
item.description: The Fundamental Limits of Fraud Detection in Card Payment Networks

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Information-theoretic Multimodal Representation Learning for Electrocardiogram Signals
item.description: Information-theoretic Multimodal Representation Learning for Electrocardiogram Signals

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Gradient Transformer: Learning to Generate Updates for LLMs
item.description: Gradient Transformer: Learning to Generate Updates for LLMs

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] The Energy Blind Spot: NVIDIA's Flagship Edge AI Hardware Cannot Support Process-Level Energy Attribution
item.description: The Energy Blind Spot: NVIDIA's Flagship Edge AI Hardware Cannot Support Process-Level Energy Attribution

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Evaluating Local Explainability Metrics for Machine Learning Models on Tabular Data
item.description: Evaluating Local Explainability Metrics for Machine Learning Models on Tabular Data

item.description: Supervised Distributional Reduction via Optimal Transport and Dependence Maximization

item.description: Faster Thermal Profiling of a Lunar Rover with Machine Learning Adapted Finite Difference Model

item.description: Transferable Reinforcement Learning via Probabilistic Latent Embeddings and Dynamic Policy Adaptation for Sim-to-Real Deployment
